nodes.name: Trigger: Business Outreach
nodes.description: Manual webhook trigger for drafting outreach from stored research.

nodes.name: Validate Outreach Input
nodes.description: Accepts lead_id and/or research_id and prepares SQL-safe lookup values.

nodes.name: Fetch Lead And Research
nodes.description: Fetches the stored research plus lead contact information.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  l.id::text AS research_id,
  l.id::text AS lead_id,
  l.company_name,
  l.website_url,
  l.city,
  l.lead_type AS business_type,
  l.services_summary AS services,
  '' AS target_customers,
  '' AS website_quality,
  '[]'::text AS missing_systems,
  l.problems_summary AS pain_points,
  l.outreach_message AS recommended_offer,
  '' AS outreach_angle,
  l.lead_score AS confidence_score,
  '[]'::text AS source_urls,
  COALESCE(l.email, '')::text AS recipient_email,
  COALESCE(l.phone, '')::text AS phone,
  COALESCE(l.notes, '')::text AS lead_notes
FROM leads l
WHERE l.id::text = '{{node_validate_input.lead_id_sql}}'
LIMIT 1

nodes.name: Setup Outreach Schema
nodes.description: Creates lead_outreach table for drafts, approvals, and sent status.

parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS lead_outreach (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  lead_id TEXT,
  research_id TEXT,
  company_name TEXT,
  website_url TEXT,
  recipient_email TEXT,
  subject TEXT,
  body TEXT,
  preview_text TEXT,
  offer TEXT,
  pain_point TEXT,
  call_to_action TEXT,
  tone TEXT,
  followup_days INTEGER,
  confidence_score INTEGER,
  draft_json JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  approval_comment TEXT,
  approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  rejected_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lead_outreach_lead_id ON lead_outreach (lead_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lead_outreach_research_id ON lead_outreach (research_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lead_outreach_status ON lead_outreach (status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lead_outreach_created_at ON lead_outreach (created_at);

nodes.name: Prepare Outreach Context
nodes.description: Normalizes research and lead details for the drafting agent.

nodes.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
nodes.description: Language model for outreach drafting.

nodes.name: Outreach Draft Agent
nodes.description: Creates a personalized outreach email draft from the stored research.

nodes.name: Parse Outreach Draft
nodes.description: Parses the draft agent JSON and falls back safely if output is imperfect.

nodes.name: Store Outreach Draft
nodes.description: Stores the draft before any human approval or sending.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO lead_outreach (lead_id, research_id, company_name, website_url, recipient_email, subject, body, preview_text, offer, pain_point, call_to_action, tone, followup_days, confidence_score, draft_json, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ('{{node_prepare_context.lead_id}}', '{{node_prepare_context.research_id}}', '{{node_prepare_context.company_name}}', NULLIF(NULLIF('{{node_prepare_context.website_url}}','N/A'),''), NULLIF('{{node_prepare_context.recipient_email}}',''), '{{node_parse_draft.subject}}', '{{node_parse_draft.body}}', '{{node_parse_draft.preview_text}}', '{{node_parse_draft.offer}}', '{{node_parse_draft.pain_point}}', '{{node_parse_draft.call_to_action}}', '{{node_parse_draft.tone}}', {{node_parse_draft.followup_days}}, {{node_parse_draft.confidence_score}}, '{{node_parse_draft.draft_json}}'::jsonb, 'pending_approval', NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id, lead_id, research_id, company_name, recipient_email, subject, body, preview_text, offer, pain_point, call_to_action, followup_days, confidence_score, status

nodes.name: Build Draft Record
nodes.description: Extracts the inserted outreach draft row for downstream email and approval nodes.

nodes.name: Build Exact Send Preview Email
nodes.description: Builds an internal approval email showing the exact message the lead will receive.

nodes.name: Human Approval: Send Outreach?
nodes.description: Review the outreach draft. Approve to send to the lead if a recipient email exists. Reject to stop and store rejected status.

parameters.title: Approve exact customer email before sending
parameters.description: Review the exact To, Subject, and Body sent to msesay@dee-empire.com. Company: {{node_build_draft_record.company_name}}. Recipient: {{node_build_draft_record.recipient_email}}. Subject: {{node_build_draft_record.subject}}. Exact body: {{node_build_draft_record.body}}. Approve only if this exact message is ready to send to the lead. Reject if anything needs revision.

nodes.name: Email Exact Send Preview To Owner
nodes.description: Sends the exact customer-facing outreach message to Dee Empire before approval.

nodes.name: Mark Draft Approved
nodes.description: Records approval decision before sending.

parameters.query: UPDATE lead_outreach SET status = 'approved', approval_comment = NULLIF('{{node_human_approval.approval_note}}',''), approved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id::text = '{{node_build_draft_record.outreach_id}}' RETURNING id, recipient_email, subject, body

nodes.name: Has Recipient Email?
nodes.description: Routes approved drafts with a recipient to send; otherwise notifies Dee Empire.

nodes.name: Send Approved Outreach
nodes.description: Sends the approved outreach email to the lead.

nodes.name: Mark Outreach Sent
nodes.description: Marks the approved outreach as sent and moves lead to contacted.

parameters.query:
UPDATE lead_outreach SET status = 'sent', sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id::text = '{{node_build_draft_record.outreach_id}}';
UPDATE leads SET pipeline_stage = 'contacted', contacted_at = COALESCE(contacted_at, NOW()), last_contact_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id::text = '{{node_build_draft_record.lead_id}}';

nodes.name: Notify No Recipient Email
nodes.description: Notifies Dee Empire that approval happened but no customer email exists.

parameters.subject: Approved outreach has no recipient: {{node_build_draft_record.company_name}}

nodes.name: Mark Approved No Recipient
nodes.description: Stores approved_no_recipient status.

parameters.query: UPDATE lead_outreach SET status = 'approved_no_recipient', approved_at = COALESCE(approved_at, NOW()), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id::text = '{{node_build_draft_record.outreach_id}}'

nodes.name: Mark Draft Rejected
nodes.description: Stores rejected status when human approval rejects the draft.

parameters.query: UPDATE lead_outreach SET status = 'rejected', approval_comment = NULLIF('{{node_human_approval.approval_note}}',''), rejected_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id::text = '{{node_build_draft_record.outreach_id}}'

nodes.name: Notify Draft Rejected
nodes.description: Notifies Dee Empire that the draft was rejected.

parameters.subject: Outreach draft rejected: {{node_build_draft_record.company_name}}

nodes.name: Done: Approved No Recipient
nodes.description: Final output when approved but no recipient email exists.

nodes.name: Done: Outreach Sent
nodes.description: Final output for approved and sent branch.

nodes.name: Done: Rejected
nodes.description: Final output for rejected branch.

parameters.noteText:
BUSINESS OUTREACH WORKFLOW - OPERATOR OVERVIEW

Purpose: create a personalized outreach email from an existing lead_research record, store it in lead_outreach, send the draft to Dee Empire for review, pause for human approval, then either send to the lead or record why it did not send.

This workflow is manual-triggered for now. Use webhook payload with research_id when possible. lead_id is allowed, but research_id is safer because it points to one exact investigation record.

Safe rule: no customer email should send before the human_approval node is approved. If the lead has no email, the workflow must not fail blindly; it goes to the no-recipient branch and notifies Dee Empire.

Main database tables:
- lead_research: source investigation data from the previous workflow.
- lead_outreach: stores the generated draft, approval result, sent status, and follow-up metadata.
- leads: updated to contacted only after an approved customer email is actually sent.

PHASE 3 - OWNER REVIEW AND HUMAN APPROVAL

Nodes in this phase:
1. Build Draft Record
2. Build Exact Send Preview Email
3. Email Exact Send Preview To Owner
4. Human Approval: Send Outreach?

What happens:
- The inserted lead_outreach row is converted into clean fields: outreach_id, lead_id, research_id, company_name, recipient_email, subject, body, offer, followup_days.
- An internal HTML approval email is sent to msesay@dee-empire.com showing the exact customer-facing To, Subject, and Body that will be sent if approved.
- This owner email is not just a summary. It is the send preview: the same recipient, subject, and message body used by Send Approved Outreach.
- The workflow pauses at human_approval until a reviewer approves or rejects in the execution approval panel.

Backend contract:
- Node type must be exactly human_approval.
- Approved handle must be exactly approved.
- Rejected handle must be exactly rejected.
- Reviewer comment is exposed as approval_note and copied into lead_outreach.approval_comment.

Debug when broken:
- If no approval screen appears, check that node_human_approval type is human_approval.
- If branches do not continue, check source_handle values: approved and rejected.
- If approval comments do not save, check references use {{node_human_approval.approval_note}}.
- If the approval email does not show the exact customer message, inspect node_build_draft_record output and Build Exact Send Preview Email.

PHASE 1 - TRIGGER, VALIDATE, DATABASE SETUP, FETCH CONTEXT

Nodes in this phase:
1. Trigger: Business Outreach
2. Validate Outreach Input
3. Setup Outreach Schema
4. Fetch Lead And Research
5. Prepare Outreach Context

Input expected:
- Best: {"research_id": "..."}
- Also accepted: {"lead_id": "..."}
- Both can be sent together.

What happens:
- Validate Outreach Input reads webhook body and accepts lead_id or research_id.
- Setup Outreach Schema creates lead_outreach if missing. This makes the workflow importable into a new database without manual table creation.
- Fetch Lead And Research reads one lead_research row and joins leads to get recipient_email, phone, and notes.
- Prepare Outreach Context normalizes the row for the AI draft agent.

What must be true:
- business_investigation.workflow.json must have already created a lead_research row.
- research_id should match lead_research.id.
- If only lead_id is used, the newest research row for that lead is selected.

Debug when broken:
- Error "Business outreach requires lead_id or research_id": webhook payload is wrong.
- Error "No lead_research row found": investigation did not run, wrong research_id, or wrong lead_id.
- Empty recipient_email is allowed; the workflow will later route to approved_no_recipient instead of sending.
- If missing_systems/source_urls are empty, inspect the original lead_research row.

PHASE 2 - AI DRAFT CREATION AND DATABASE STORAGE

Nodes in this phase:
1. Gemini 2.5 Pro
2. Outreach Draft Agent
3. Parse Outreach Draft
4. Store Outreach Draft

What happens:
- Outreach Draft Agent receives clean research context from Prepare Outreach Context.
- The agent creates a respectful German outreach email unless the research suggests another language.
- The customer email must be plain text and human: greeting, one specific observation, one problem/opportunity, one Dee Empire offer, soft CTA, then the full Mohamed Sesay business signature.
- Sender details must be present in the final body: Mohamed Sesay, Founder & Automation Consultant, Dee Empire, Forststraße 6, 96264 Altenkunstadt, msesay@dee-empire.com, WhatsApp: +49 152 15461719, dee-empire.com.
- Do not add logos, banners, HTML, or fancy styling to the customer message. The owner preview email may use light Dee Empire styling, but the lead receives plain text.
- Parse Outreach Draft converts AI JSON into safe fields, creates fallback text if the model returns imperfect JSON, and appends the full Mohamed Sesay signature if the AI forgets it.
- Store Outreach Draft inserts the draft into lead_outreach with status pending_approval.

Reusable format:
- See folder/docs/workflows/business_outreach_letter_template.md for the standard letter structure.

Important backend template rule:
Script node return fields are referenced directly. Use node_parse_draft.subject style references. Do not add an extra output layer between the script node id and the returned field.

What is stored in lead_outreach:
- lead_id, research_id, company_name, website_url
- recipient_email
- subject, body, preview_text
- pain_point, offer, call_to_action
- tone, followup_days, confidence_score
- draft_json
- status = pending_approval

Debug when broken:
- If database insert fails, inspect Store Outreach Draft query and Parse Outreach Draft output.
- If draft is generic, inspect lead_research fields: website_quality, pain_points, recommended_offer, outreach_angle.
- If subject/body are empty, inspect Outreach Draft Agent output and Parse Outreach Draft output.
- If position or address is missing, inspect Parse Outreach Draft because it should append the full signature.
- If SQL errors mention quotes, check that Parse Outreach Draft is escaping apostrophes.

PHASE 4 - APPROVED, NO-RECIPIENT, AND REJECTED BRANCHES

Approved branch:
1. Mark Draft Approved
2. Has Recipient Email?
3. If true: Send Approved Outreach
4. Mark Outreach Sent
5. Done: Outreach Sent

Approved but no recipient branch:
1. Has Recipient Email? routes false
2. Notify No Recipient Email
3. Mark Approved No Recipient
4. Done: Approved No Recipient

Rejected branch:
1. Mark Draft Rejected
2. Notify Draft Rejected
3. Done: Rejected

What happens when approved with recipient:
- lead_outreach.status becomes approved, then sent.
- Customer email is sent to node_build_draft_record.recipient_email.
- leads.pipeline_stage becomes contacted.
- leads.contacted_at and leads.last_contact_at are updated.

What happens when approved with no recipient:
- No customer email is sent.
- Dee Empire receives an internal notice.
- lead_outreach.status becomes approved_no_recipient.

What happens when rejected:
- No customer email is sent.
- lead_outreach.status becomes rejected.
- Dee Empire receives an internal rejected notice.

Debug when broken:
- If approved email does not send, check Has Recipient Email? output and recipient_email.
- If lead stage does not update, check lead_id and the leads.pipeline_stage constraint allows contacted.
- If rejected branch does not run, check human_approval rejected handle.
- If customer receives email without approval, the graph is wrong: Send Approved Outreach must only be reachable from human_approval approved branch.

DATABASE CONTRACT - DO NOT GUESS

Source table: lead_research
- Created by business_investigation.workflow.json.
- This workflow reads the saved investigation and does not redo research.

Draft table: lead_outreach
- Created by Setup Outreach Schema.
- Stores every draft before approval.
- Keeps status history for pending_approval, approved, sent, approved_no_recipient, rejected.

CRM table: leads
- Only updated to pipeline_stage = contacted after a customer email is actually sent.
- Do not set contacted when approval is rejected or when no recipient email exists.

Reason lead_id/research_id are TEXT in lead_outreach:
- Prevents integer/UUID mismatch errors across environments.
- Queries compare ids using id::text.

When maintaining this workflow:
- Keep research data in lead_research.
- Keep outreach draft/send data in lead_outreach.
- Keep CRM pipeline state in leads.
- Do not mix these responsibilities.

TESTING AND REPAIR GUIDE

Safe test order:
1. Run business investigation first.
2. Copy research_id from the investigation output or lead_research table.
3. Trigger this workflow with {"research_id": "..."}.
4. Confirm lead_outreach has a new row with status pending_approval.
5. Confirm the internal approval email arrives and shows the exact customer-facing To, Subject, and Body.
6. In the execution approval panel, reject first to test the rejected branch.
7. Test approved_no_recipient with a lead that has no email.
8. Only approve a real send when recipient_email is correct.

Common repairs:
- Wrong payload: fix Validate Outreach Input expectations.
- No research row: rerun business investigation.
- Empty draft: inspect lead_research fields and Outreach Draft Agent output.
- Approval not pausing: verify node type human_approval.
- Branch not routing: verify approved/rejected handles.
- Email send fails: check project email provider and recipient_email.

Never bypass human_approval while testing. That node is the safety gate.
